I am an organized person.
I have a calm morning routine.
I do not like to speak fast.
She works with people every day.
Hi! I am Daniel. I do not think we have met. What is your name?
Hi, Daniel. My name is Vanessa. Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too, Vanessa. So, what do you do?
I work with people, and I usually plan my day in the morning. I am quite organized.
That sounds great. And why are you learning English?
Well, I sometimes feel nervous when I speak. My goal is to feel confident and speak clearly.
That is a wonderful goal. And honestly, you sound very clear to me already.
Thank you, Daniel. That means a lot to me.
My name is Vanessa. Nice to meet you.
I am 46 years old, and I live in Brazil.
I usually plan my day. I am an organized person.
I sometimes feel nervous, but I am learning.
My goal is to speak English with confidence.

Hi Vanessa, this is your teacher, Daniel. Welcome to your first class. I just want to say one thing before we start. You do not need to be perfect today. You do not need to know every word. My only job today is to listen to you and to learn who you are. So please relax. Speak slowly. Take your time. If you forget a word, that is completely fine. We will build everything together, step by step. I am really happy to start this journey with you. See you in class.

Let me tell you about a normal day for me. I usually wake up early, around six thirty. I make a cup of coffee, and I check my phone for a few minutes. Then I start my work. I am quite organized, so I like to plan my day before I begin. In the afternoon, I have lunch with my family or with a friend. In the evening, I relax. I read a little, or I watch a series. I do not go to bed late. I feel calm when my day has a clear structure. That is who I am.
First, say hello and give your name. Second, say where you are from. Third, say what you do every day. Fourth, say one thing you like. Fifth, say your goal with English.
